mapper.sql: DeptNo, StateFlag, ID, order_Id, order_item, num, do_source, sub_model_no, gather_warehouse_code, warehouse_code, inventory_table_type, inventory_type_code, customer_no, group_customer_no, sales_info_no, sub_out_qty, remark, delflag, create_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, model_no, handle_status, expinv_code, dept_no, OptCode, OptState, out_qty, stock_type, stock_code, ordtype
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.Inventory_test
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.Inventory_test (DeptNo, StateFlag, ID, order_Id, order_item, num, do_source, sub_model_no, gather_warehouse_code, warehouse_code, inventory_table_type, inventory_type_code, customer_no, group_customer_no, sales_info_no, sub_out_qty, remark, delflag, create_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, model_no, handle_status, expinv_code, dept_no, OptCode, OptState, out_qty, stock_type, stock_code, ordtype) values (#{deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stateflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{num,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{doSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subModelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gatherWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subOutQty,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{handleStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expinvCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{optcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{optstate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{stockType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ordtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

mapper.update:
update dbo.Inventory_test
DeptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
StateFlag = #{record.stateflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ID = #{record.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_Id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
num = #{record.num,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
do_source = #{record.doSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sub_model_no = #{record.subModelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gather_warehouse_code = #{record.gatherWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_table_type = #{record.inventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_type_code = #{record.inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
group_customer_no = #{record.groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sales_info_no = #{record.salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sub_out_qty = #{record.subOutQty,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
handle_status = #{record.handleStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expinv_code = #{record.expinvCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_no = #{record.deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OptCode = #{record.optcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OptState = #{record.optstate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
out_qty = #{record.outQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
stock_type = #{record.stockType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stock_code = #{record.stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ordtype = #{record.ordtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.Inventory_test set DeptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, StateFlag = #{record.stateflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ID = #{record.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_Id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, num = #{record.num,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, do_source = #{record.doSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sub_model_no = #{record.subModelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gather_warehouse_code = #{record.gatherWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inventory_table_type = #{record.inventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inventory_type_code = #{record.inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, group_customer_no = #{record.groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sales_info_no = #{record.salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sub_out_qty = #{record.subOutQty,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, handle_status = #{record.handleStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, expinv_code = #{record.expinvCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_no = #{record.deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OptCode = #{record.optcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OptState = #{record.optstate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, out_qty = #{record.outQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, stock_type = #{record.stockType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stock_code = #{record.stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ordtype = #{record.ordtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
